title: The Food Audit #3: Daisy’s in the Park, Pinner
dek: Swati brings her Food Audit lens back to Pinner after a Cambridge Italian precision review — focused on process, service flow and the small details that shape a meal.
body: Based on Swati’s public LinkedIn activity, this review belongs to her Food Audit series and brings the audit back to Pinner. The site is structured so Swati can replace this holding copy with her full approved LinkedIn post text and original images. The editorial angle is quality-focused: atmosphere, service flow, food consistency, presentation and whether the experience earns a return visit.

title: The Food Audit #2: Dulcis Gelato & Pasticcini, Cambridge
dek: A masterclass in Italian precision: gelato, pasticcini and the systems behind a polished customer experience.
body: Swati’s public LinkedIn preview describes this as a move from a weekend wind-down to a masterclass in Italian precision. This page is ready for the full review: what worked, what could improve, how the queue/service experience felt, and whether the product quality matched the presentation.

title: The Food Audit #1: The Moon, Harrow
dek: The first official Food Audit review, putting the menu and experience at The Moon in Harrow under Swati’s detail-focused lens.
body: This is the first item visible in Swati’s public Food Audit activity. The website treats it as the start of a repeatable review format: food, service, presentation, value and process. Full LinkedIn copy and original images can be imported once Swati provides access or exports the content.
